title: Usapho Indlu to hold its AGM
description: GEORGE NEWS - Usapho Indlu, the George...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Usapho Indlu, the George community organisation dedicated to household and family support, invites members and interested parties to its AGM on Tuesday 21 October.


> The meeting will take place at the George Methodist Church, 8 Plantation Road, starting at 15:45 for 16:00, and is expected to last one hour.


Attendees will have the opportunity to hear about the organisation's progress and growth over the past year.

The meeting aims to engage members, share updates and encourage active participation in the organisation's ongoing projects.

RSVPs are requested via WhatsApp to 072 241 5442 or by an email to [email protected], as the organisers would like to record all responses.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
